description: Replace the heavyweight Podman/OCI gastown container service (home-gastown-oci-service-type) with a lightweight Linux namespace container using unshare. A computed-file bash script handles namespace setup, mounts, and activation. The host shepherd runs it via unshare --user --map-root-user --mount --pid --fork --kill-child=SIGTERM. No Podman dependency. Key design: separate HOME path (/tmp/gastown-home), no pivot_root so host filesystem stays visible (guix shell works), --map-root-user for mount operations, shared host network, --kill-child=SIGTERM for graceful shutdown.
title: Replace OCI/Podman gastown container with Linux namespace container
